model-value.desc: Model of the component; Either use this property (along with a listener for 'update:model-value' event) OR use v-model directive
model-value.desc_cn: 组件的 model 数据；可以使用该属性（以及监听 'update:model-value' 事件）或者使用 v-model 指令。

title.desc_cn: 可选的标题（除非使用了 'title' 插槽）

auto-save.desc: Automatically save the model (if changed) when user clicks/taps outside of the popup; It does not apply to ESC key
auto-save.desc_cn: 当用户在弹出窗口外部点击/触摸时，自动保存模型（如果有更改）；不适用于 ESC 键。

color.desc: Color name for component from the Quasar Color Palette
color.desc_cn: 来自 Quasar 颜色调色板的组件颜色名称

validate.desc: Validates model then triggers 'save' and closes Popup; Returns a Boolean ('true' means valid, 'false' means abort); Syntax: validate(value); For best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: Is the model valid or not?

validate.desc_cn: 验证模型，然后触发 'save' 事件并关闭弹出窗口；返回一个布尔值（'true' 表示有效，'false' 表示中止）；语法：validate(value)；为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域引用它，不要内联定义。

disable.desc_cn: 将组件置于禁用模式下

fit.desc: Allows the menu to match at least the full width of its target
fit.desc_cn: 允许菜单至少与其目标的宽度相匹配

cover.desc: Allows the menu to cover its target. When used, the 'self' and 'fit' props are no longer effective
cover.desc_cn: 允许菜单覆盖其目标。当使用时，'self' 和 'fit' 属性将不再生效

anchor.desc: Two values setting the starting position or anchor point of the menu relative to its target
anchor.desc_cn: 两个值设置菜单相对于其目标的起始位置或锚点

self.desc: Two values setting the menu's own position relative to its target
self.desc_cn: 两个值设置菜单相对于其目标的位置

offset.desc: An array of two numbers to offset the menu horizontally and vertically in pixels
offset.desc_cn: 一个包含两个数字的数组，用于以像素为单位水平和垂直偏移菜单。

touch-position.desc: Allows for the target position to be set by the mouse position, when the target of the menu is either clicked or touched
touch-position.desc_cn: 允许通过鼠标位置设置目标位置，当菜单的目标被点击或触摸时。

persistent.desc: Avoid menu closing by hitting ESC key or by clicking/tapping outside of the Popup
persistent.desc_cn: 避免通过按下 ESC 键或在弹出窗口外部点击/触摸来关闭菜单

separate-close-popup.desc: Separate from parent menu, marking it as a separate closing point for v-close-popup (without this, chained menus close all together)
separate-close-popup.desc_cn: 与父菜单分离，将其标记为 v-close-popup 的独立关闭点（如果没有此选项，链接的菜单会一起关闭）。

square.desc: Forces menu to have squared borders
square.desc_cn: 强制菜单具有方形边框

max-height.desc: The maximum height of the menu; Size in CSS units, including unit name
max-height.desc_cn: 菜单的最大高度；以 CSS 单位表示的大小，包括单位名称

max-width.desc: The maximum width of the menu; Size in CSS units, including unit name
max-width.desc_cn: 菜单的最大宽度；以 CSS 单位表示的大小，包括单位名称

default.desc: Used for injecting the form component; Do NOT destructure it

validate.desc: Function that checks if the value is valid

returns.desc: Checked value is valid or not

validate.desc_cn: 检查值是否有效的函数

set.desc: Function that sets the value and closes the popup
set.desc_cn: 设置值并关闭弹出窗口的函数

cancel.desc: Function that cancels the editing and reverts the value to the initialValue
cancel.desc_cn: 取消编辑并将值恢复为初始值的函数

updatePosition.desc: There are some custom scenarios for which Quasar cannot automatically reposition the component without significant performance drawbacks so the optimal solution is for you to call this method when you need it
updatePosition.desc_cn: 在某些自定义场景下，Quasar 无法自动重新定位组件而不会带来显著的性能损耗，因此最佳解决方案是在需要时调用该方法。

default.desc_cn: 用于注入表单组件；请勿解构它

update:model-value.desc: Emitted when Popup gets cancelled in order to reset model to its initial value; Is also used by v-model
update:model-value.desc_cn: 当弹出窗口被取消时，会触发此事件以将模型重置为其初始值；也被 v-model 使用

before-show.desc: Emitted right before Popup gets shown
before-show.desc_cn: 在 Popup 显示之前发出的事件

show.desc: Emitted right after Popup gets shown
show.desc_cn: 在 Popup 显示后立即发出的事件

before-hide.desc: Emitted right before Popup gets dismissed
before-hide.desc_cn: 在弹出窗口关闭之前发出的事件

hide.desc: Emitted right after Popup gets dismissed
hide.desc_cn: 在 Popup 被关闭后立即触发

save.desc: Emitted when value has been successfully validated and it should be saved

value.desc_cn: 要保存的经过验证的值

save.desc_cn: 当值成功验证并应该保存时触发

cancel.desc: Emitted when user cancelled the change (hit ESC key or clicking outside of Popup or hit 'Cancel' button)
cancel.desc_cn: 当用户取消更改时触发（按下 ESC 键或在弹出窗口外单击或点击“取消”按钮）

set.desc: Trigger a model update; Validates model (and emits 'save' event if it's the case) then closes Popup
set.desc_cn: 触发模型更新；验证模型（如果需要则触发 'save' 事件），然后关闭弹出窗口。

cancel.desc: Triggers a model reset to its initial value ('cancel' event is emitted) then closes Popup
cancel.desc_cn: 触发模型重置为其初始值（触发'cancel'事件），然后关闭弹出窗口

updatePosition.desc: There are some custom scenarios for which Quasar cannot automatically reposition the component without significant performance drawbacks so the optimal solution is for you to call this method when you need it
updatePosition.desc_cn: 在某些自定义场景下，Quasar 无法自动重新定位组件而不会带来显著的性能损耗，因此最佳解决方案是在需要时调用该方法。
